overview.short: Rikhabdeo ( Rishabhadeo) is a town in Udaipur district in the state of Rajasthan, in north-west India.
overview.description: Rikhabdeo ( Rishabhadeo) is a town in Udaipur district in the state of Rajasthan, in north-west India. Rishabhadeo is situated 65 kilometres (40 mi) from Udaipur and is on Udaipur-Ahmedabad Road. The name of the town is also Dhulev The place got its name from a Bhil chieftain named Dhuleva who guarded the temple of Lord Rishabhdev ., however it is better known as Rishabhadeo. It is a well-known pilgrimage site for the temple Kesariyaji Tirth (a.

topPlaces.description: Narsingpura is one of the Jain communities. It originated from the Mewar (Rajasthan) region.

items.note: Narsingpura is one of the Jain communities. It originated from the Mewar (Rajasthan) region.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rishabhdeo?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rishabhdeo is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (76 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rishabhdeo?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rishabhdeo at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rishabhdeo?
faq.a: Stays in Rishabhdeo start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
